data.name: 精靈女上司的訓狗術
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


這是一個女尊男卑的世界，根據進化論所述，女人是上帝的造物，而男人是由發情公狗進化而來的劣畜，所以男人天生就比高貴的女性要低一等。無論是多麼聰明的男人，面對女人都只能屈服於石榴裙下。
但任憑性慾支配自身，真的好嗎？我不想向這種不合理的世界屈服，所以我畢生都在謀求改變自身的地位，最終成功進入了世界第一企業、男人的天堂——帝女集團。
但在帝女集團的培訓階段，發生的一切都超出了我的預料，因為這裡的培訓內容不是提升知識能力，而是強化性能力。



「相信我，我會幫助你通過培訓。」

所幸在這危急關頭，我的直屬女上司幫助了我，而且她還是一名美麗的精靈，這是多麼幸運的事情啊。
然而，最終能否把握住改變地位的機會，還是要看我自己。
在這七天內，我見證了眾多男同事淪為發情公狗、與美麗的女上司約會、還有神秘的反叛軍……
而這一切都在表明帝女集團並不是表面上那麼簡單，而且，這個世界為何會變成這樣？
無論如何，從進入帝女集團的那一刻起，我便已經無法逃離。

最終，我究竟是成為其中的一名員工、還是屈服性慾淪為發情公狗、或是與美麗的女上司終成眷屬呢……？

◆玩法


主線劇情中有多次選項，每一次的選擇都將影響最終的結局。
而隨著劇情發展將逐步可探索區域，【思考】可以提供主線的線索，主角需要根據之前經歷的一切探索各個區域，並隨著發現這個世界的真相。

◆遊戲特色


◇18張基本CG，3組動態CG，包含差分700張以上
◇遊戲文字9萬字
◇一位主要女角
◇推理劇情向、上司調教題材遊戲
◇遊戲結局：9種

data.short_description: 這是一個女尊男卑的世界，女人是上帝的造物，而男人是由發情公狗進化而來的劣畜。想要改變卑劣的地位，那只能成為世界第一企業“帝女集團”的員工，而我有幸獲得了這樣一個機會。但接下來還有為期七天的培訓……最終我到底能改變自身、還是向身為發情公狗的命運屈服呢？
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Elf boss's dog training
data.detailed_description:
◆story


This is a world where women are superior to men. According to the theory of evolution, women are God’s creatures, and men are inferior animals evolved from male dogs in heat, so men are naturally inferior to noble women. No matter how smart a man is, when facing a woman he can only threw himself at her feet (and yield to the beauty of her skirt.)

But is it really good to let your sexual desire rule you? I didn’t want to give in to this unreasonable world, so I spent my life seeking to change my status. I finally succeeded in joining the world's number one company and a man's paradise, the Empress Group.

But everything that happened during the training phase of the Empress Group went beyond my expectations, because the training was not about improving knowledge but strengthening sexuality.



"Trust me, I'll help you get through the training."

Fortunately, my direct supervisor helped me in this critical situation—and she is a beautiful elf, how fortunate.

However, it is up to me to seize the opportunity to change my status.
In these seven days, I have witnessed many male colleagues degenerate into male dogs in heat, dating their beautiful bosses, but then there are the mysterious rebels…

And all of this shows that the Empress Group is not as simple as it seems. Moreover, why has the world become like this?
Anyway, from the moment I entered the Empress Group, I could not escape.

In the end, will I become one of the employees, or will I give in to my sexual desire and become a male dog in heat, finally with my beautiful boss as a couple…?

◆Gameplay


There are multiple options in the main storyline, and each choice will affect the final ending.
The development of the plot will gradually open the explorable area. [Think] can provide a hint for the main line. The protagonist needs to explore each area according to all the previous experience, discovering the truth of the world.

◆Game features


◇18 basic CGs, including more than 700 differentials and 3 motion CGs
◇90,000 words of game text
◇One main female character
◇Reasoning plot and boss conditioning theme games
◇Game ending: 9 kinds

If you want to change your inferior status, you can only become an employee of the world's number one company, the "Empress Group.But the next seven days of training…will eventually change me. Will I give in to my fate as a male dog in heat?
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, German, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
